title: THE FENCE — default-deny Anthropic billing; assert on the effective resolved base URL (#217-aware); scoped purge exception

tests.summary: fence-ok — THE FENCE block (8 tests) + FENCE-containment block (2 tests) green: no base URL throws FenceViolation (Max/Anthropic path); an Anthropic base URL throws; a non-Anthropic URL passes; acceptApiBilling:true is the only override and states FULL RATES; a settings.json env ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL override (#217) is asserted on the EFFECTIVE URL and refused; isAnthropicBaseUrl classifies by hostname suffix (api.z.ai / api.deepseek.com are non-Anthropic). Containment: only lib/sdk-client.mjs imports @anthropic-ai and it pairs with lib/fence.mjs; no fitting source uses the banned host literal.

purge.summary: Scoped exception verified: the fenced lib/sdk-client.mjs import is NOT flagged (grep count 0). The single remaining offender is the PRE-EXISTING, out-of-brief-scope fittings/seed/knowledge/scripts/knowledge.mjs :: --print (red before this build). This slice added ZERO new offenders; fence-ok rides the dedicated agent-sdk-runtime fence tests, not this pre-existing red.

notes: The fence detects Anthropic by hostname suffix (anthropic.com / *.anthropic.com) via the URL parser — never the narrower banned host literal — so the guard code itself does not trip the programmatic-purge ban. Defence-in-depth: THE HARNESS sets settingSources without 'user', so the user settings.json env block does not load; the fence does not rely on that and still asserts the effective URL.
